Node Score
The Node Score within the GPUnet ecosystem is a metric designed to quantify the contribution and significance of a node based on the number of Node License Keys it holds.

This score is a critical component of the overall reputation score, influencing the distribution of network rewards.

Assuming a perfect Node Validator health ie NH = 1, the following cases illustrate what Rewards multiplier you get based on your Node Score
0%
0
100
